Hi Percival, what are your plans for the upcoming quarter?
First, we are going to launch a new safety project. I think it will be a big challenge.
Nice. Are you going to hire more people for the team?
Yes. Next month we are going to hire two engineers. The budget is ready.
Great. What does the forecast say? Do you expect a good year?
Yes. The forecast is strong, so we are going to expand to two new cities. I predict a great year.
I expect a great year for the company.

Hi, this is Percival. I want to tell you about my plans for the next quarter. First, we are going to launch a new safety project at EGEA. I think it will be a big challenge, but I am sure it will succeed. Next month, we are going to hire two new engineers for the risk team. The budget is ready, and the board will approve it on Monday. I expect the team to grow fast this year. The forecast for the company is very good, so we are going to expand to two new cities. Our upcoming meeting is on Friday, and I am going to present the full plan. I think it is going to be a great year.

Hi Percival, this is Karen. I want to share my plans for the upcoming month. Next week, I am going to visit the new plant in Recife. I think the trip will be short, only two days. After that, we are going to start the audit for the new client. I expect a lot of work, but I am sure the team will do well. The budget is almost ready, and I will send you the final numbers tomorrow. I predict good results for this quarter. Talk to you soon, and have a great week.

First, Percival is going to launch the new safety project. Then, the company is going to hire two new engineers. After that, the board will approve the budget on Monday. Later, the team is going to expand to two new cities. Finally, Percival is going to present the plan at the upcoming meeting.
